title: I tested the Eufy Omni S2 robotic vacuum — and it's expensive and impressive in equal measure
summary: More power, of course, with greater suction thanks to Eufy’s new AeroTurbo 2.0 tech, improved intelligence, greater threshold clearance, a more powerful mop, better computer vision, a self-cleaning mop, electrolysed water, integrated detergent and even a built-in fragrance system with three included…
